news.t: MicroSectors™ Launches U.S. Travel Long & Short Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: FLYU is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Uber Technologies stock at 14.14%, The Walt Disney Company at 13.20%, Booking Holdings at 9.40%, Airbnb at 7.98%, and Carnival Corporation at 5.23%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Travel 3x Leveraged ETN (FLYU) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the MerQube MicroSectors U.S. Travel index. The fund tracks 3x the daily price movements of a liquidity-weighted index of US-listed travel-related companies. FLYU was launched on Jun 24, 2022 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.title: MicroSectors™ Launches U.S. Travel Long & Short Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca
data.text: NEW YORK , June 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ - REX Shares, LLC ("REX") today announced the launch of two new MicroSectors Exchange Traded Notes (ETNs) issued by Bank of Montreal (BMO) linked to the MerQube M...
